skills.title: Environment Setup
skills.description: Install ESP-IDF, source the toolchain, verify dependencies

skills.title: Build & Flash
skills.description: Build the firmware with idf.py, flash via deploy.sh or esptool

skills.title: Menuconfig
skills.description: Configure WiFi, camera module, AI model parameters via idf.py menuconfig

skills.title: System Architecture
skills.description: Full pipeline: Camera → AI → HTTP streamer, FreeRTOS queue wiring

skills.title: Camera Driver
skills.description: Camera init, frame capture task, pixel formats, frame sizes

skills.title: AI Detection Modules
skills.description: Face, motion, color, cat-face detection — FreeRTOS task patterns

skills.title: Face Recognition
skills.description: Face enrollment, flash storage via fr partition, recognition model selection

skills.title: Web Streaming & REST API
skills.description: MJPEG stream (port 81), control REST API (port 80), embedded HTML UIs

skills.title: WiFi & mDNS
skills.description: Dual-mode WiFi (STA + AP), mDNS service advertisement, camera discovery

skills.title: LCD Display
skills.description: Optional LCD output via BSP, wallpaper, frame rendering task

skills.title: QR / Barcode Scanner
skills.description: esp-code-scanner prebuilt lib, Code39/Code128/QR decode API

skills.title: Hardware Pin Mapping
skills.description: Pin definitions for ESP32-S3-WROOM-CAM and all supported camera modules
